Event: Magic Well - July 2024
Event Date: 01/07/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM158


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Explorer Chest
Royal Pharmacist Amulet

Once in a while, the unit casts fatigue on 3 random enemies for 5 sec. During this time, the fatigued unit can't gain shields or effects that reduce or absorb incoming damage. The fatigued unit's damage and attack speed are reduced by 45% for 5 sec. Additionally, the cooldown of the fatigued unit's weapon, armor, artifact, ring, totem, and amulet abilities is increased by 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
